trustpilot.note: Bajaj Allianz does not have a meaningful Trustpilot profile. Indian general insurers concentrate review activity on Policybazaar / InsuranceDekho / MouthShut rather than Trustpilot.

notable_themes: Best-in-class low complaint count (3 per 10K, industry-leading)
Strong solvency and credit rating (AAA stable)
Settles claims typically within 7 working days
Less marketed than Star/HDFC but quietly strong on metrics
Aug-Sep 2025 cashless suspension drama (15,200 hospitals via AHPI) resolved; reputation hit but temporary

aggregate_score.headline: Industry-leading complaints record (3 per 10K) and high CSR (92.2%); third-largest non-life insurer in India
aggregate_score.computation_notes: 0.40*92.24 + 0.20*(100-6) + 0.15*(4.47*20) + 0.10*90 + 0.10*90 + 0.05*100 = 36.9 + 18.8 + 13.4 + 9 + 9 + 5 = 92.1. Adjusted down to 84.5 because brand awareness in health-specific (vs general) segment is mid-tier and review-count footprint smaller than Star/HDFC.
